MIPLIB 2017 project-scheduling instance; imported from mipster's own C-interface test suite (test/fixtures/A-1.mps.gz, certified optimal used by CInterfaceTest_a1)

MIPLIB 2017+spp multi-commodity flow instance; imported from mipster's own C-interface test suite (test/fixtures/attfInst1.mps.gz). Certified optimal (202) confirmed via an independent MILP solver at 0% gap; MIPster itself does not close this gap within 90s but validates the incumbent as feasible.

MIPLIB 2017 graph-drawing (entity placement) instance; imported from mipster's own C-interface test suite (test/fixtures/graphdraw-domain.mps.gz). MIPster's own test documents it as hard/not-proven-quickly, but an independent MILP solver closed it to 0% gap (obj=19686) in well under a minute; MIPster validates the incumbent as feasible but does not itself close the gap within 90s.

MIPLIB 2017 instance (COR@L test set); imported from mipster's own C-interface test suite (test/fixtures/leo1.mps.gz). Matches the MIPLIB-certified optimal exactly; independently reconfirmed at 0% gap. MIPster validates the incumbent as feasible but does not itself close the gap within 90s.
